query:
SELECT dp.id AS planId, dp.date, dp.dayType, dp.status, COUNT(b.id) AS block_count, SUM(b.durationMin) AS total_min
FROM dailyPlans dp
LEFT JOIN scheduleBlocks b ON b.planId = dp.id
WHERE dp.date = '2026-05-18'
GROUP BY dp.id, dp.date, dp.dayType, dp.status;
